claim: Verification blocked: Explorer and cross-checker failed to perform explicit external research required by the demand. The demand text explicitly states: 'use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool on https://example.com only as external background evidence.' Neither agent attempted external research, and no external-scoped evidence with url field was produced. While project-scoped evidence is well-documented, the missing external evidence means the acceptance criteria 'agents can use web/fetch/search-capable tools as external evidence' has not been demonstrated for this demand.

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch() would detect the explicit URL 'https://example.com' in the demand text and trigger external research requirement.
evidence.why: The demand contains https://example.com, which should have triggered external research detection.

evidence.summary: Runtime validation would generate EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker since no agent results contain external-scoped evidence.
evidence.why: Current agent results lack any external evidence, which would cause a blocker in production.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() classification logic requires url field or scope='external' for external evidence classification.
evidence.why: Verifies that external evidence must have specific structure to be recognized as external.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() enforcement would block this demand if treated as brownfield with only project evidence.
evidence.why: External evidence is required but missing from previous agent results.

assumptions: Assuming https://example.com is accessible and would return valid content for external evidence purposes.
risks: If the agents cannot or will not use web/fetch/search tools when explicitly requested, the external research feature is not functional.
Missing external evidence means the acceptance criteria 'agents can use web/fetch/search-capable tools as external evidence' has not been validated.
missing: External research on https://example.com as explicitly requested by the demand text. Neither explorer nor cross-checker performed web fetch/search on the specified URL.
External-scoped evidence record with url field set to https://example.com or fetched content summary.
Demonstration that web/fetch/search tools are actually available and usable in the agent environment.

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker provided excellent project-scoped evidence but failed to perform the explicit external research requested in the demand. The demand clearly states 'use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool on https://example.com only as external background evidence.' No agent attempted to fetch https://example.com or produced external-scoped evidence. This violates the agent protocol rule: 'If the demand text includes a URL or explicit external research request, your result must include at least one external evidence record with scope=external and a url/tool/source summary.' The evidence agreement is incomplete without external research validation.
